payload.label: chair
payload.short_description: dark wooden barstool with black seat
payload.long_description: Partial, edge-cropped dark brown glossy wooden barstool with a round black cushioned seat and a circular metal/wood footrest ring; front curved legs and stretcher visible, stool is medium-height (bar stool) and partially occluded by a person's arm and red cloth — approximate distance ~1.2 m from camera.
